description: Pushed PDFs to reMarkable with filenames like '2026-03-24-yall-street-brief' and 'Yall-Street-Brief' instead of simple, clean names like the event or person name. reMarkable document names should be human-readable — no dashes, no date prefixes, just the event/person/company name.
correction: reMarkable uploads must use clean, simple names: event name, person name, or company name. No dashes, no date prefixes, no kebab-case filenames.
systemic_fix: Update remarkable-upload mental model: document names on the tablet should read like a label you'd write on a folder — 'Texas Tribune Yall Street', 'YPO Tech Dine Around'. Strip dates and dashes. Match how David would scan for it on the tablet screen.
